svg.title: Wing Knob — Engineering Drawing
svg.text: 40mm body dia x 25mm deep — PETG — Qty 1 — Internal Tr12x3 2-start trapezoidal thread
4. Print upright, threaded end up, 0.12-0.16mm layers
5. Flat rear annular face bears against shell front wall
6. Knurled exterior: diamond pattern, ~1mm depth, ~2mm pitch
7. Wing tip profile: half-stadium (R2.5 at tip)
